title: Alex Jones Reveals Why Joe Rogan Will Start His OWN Platform
summary: A brief discussion about Joe Rogan's potential to start his own independent platform, with the guest expressing enthusiasm about joining such a venture. The conversation touches on censorship concerns and the appeal of an uncensored content platform.

key_claims.claim: Joe Rogan has the infrastructure and setup ready to start his own platform
If Spotify doesn't support Joe Rogan, he will start his own platform
Joe Rogan's potential platform would include hundreds of other content creators
